Biography个人简介

Mengyu Chang is a postdoctoral fellow in the Department of Radiation Oncology at The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center.

Her research focuses on multifunctional nanomaterials for cancer diagnosis and therapy, including single-atom nanozymes, tumor microenvironment-responsive nanocomposites, multimodal imaging-guided therapy, photothermal and photodynamic therapy, ferroptosis-boosted treatment, and cancer immunotherapy.

Before joining MD Anderson, she was a postdoctoral fellow at Nanyang Technological University and completed her Ph.D. at the Changchun Institute of Applied Chemistry, Chinese Academy of Sciences.

常梦宇现为德克萨斯大学 MD Anderson 癌症中心放射肿瘤学系博士后研究员。

她的研究聚焦于用于肿瘤诊断与治疗的多功能纳米材料，包括单原子纳米酶、肿瘤微环境响应型纳米复合材料、多模态影像引导治疗、光热/光动力治疗、铁死亡增强治疗和肿瘤免疫治疗。

加入 MD Anderson 之前，她曾在新加坡南洋理工大学从事博士后研究，并在中国科学院长春应用化学研究所获得博士学位。

Research focus研究方向

Mengyu's work develops multifunctional nanomaterials, single-atom nanozymes, and tumor microenvironment-responsive platforms for multimodal imaging-guided cancer therapy.她的工作发展多功能纳米材料、单原子纳米酶以及肿瘤微环境响应平台，用于多模态影像引导的肿瘤治疗。

News最新动态

2026

PAPERJOURNALNATURE COMM Dual phagocytosis-checkpoint blockade revitalizes immune surveillance in mouse models of glioblastoma appeared in Nature Communications, 2026.

2025

PAPERJOURNALNATURE CANCER An antibody-toxin conjugate targeting CD47 linked to the bacterial toxin listeriolysin O for cancer immunotherapy appeared in Nature Cancer 6 (3), 511-527, 2025.

2025

PAPERJOURNALACS NANO A generative artificial intelligence copilot for biomedical nanoengineering appeared in ACS Nano 19 (20), 19394-19407, 2025.

2025

PAPERCONFERENCEPOSTER 206 Engineering mRNA-loaded immunogenic exosomes for targeted glioblastoma immunotherapy appeared in Neurosurgery 71 (Supplement_1), 52-53, 2025.

2024

PAPERJOURNALADV MATER NIR-activatable heterostructured nanoadjuvant CoP/NiCoP executing lactate metabolism interventions for boosted photocatalytic hydrogen therapy and photoimmunotherapy appeared in Advanced Materials 36 (5), 2308774, 2024.

2024

PAPERJOURNALCEJ Capacitive deionization of uranium mediated by dioxygen functionalities in the C=O=C=O segment of polyacrylic acid-functionalized graphene aerogel appeared in Chemical Engineering Journal 481, 148388, 2024.

Research研究方向

Her research builds therapeutic nanomaterials that sense the tumor microenvironment, convert external energy into therapeutic effects, and coordinate multiple treatment pathways.她的研究构建能够感知肿瘤微环境、将外部能量转化为治疗效应并协同多种治疗通路的纳米治疗材料。

01

Thread 01方向 01

Single-Atom Nanozymes单原子纳米酶

Designing atomically dispersed catalytic sites to regulate reactive oxygen species, metabolism, ferroptosis, and mild photothermal therapeutic response.设计原子级分散的催化位点，用于调控活性氧、细胞代谢、铁死亡以及温和光热治疗响应。

02

Thread 02方向 02

Imaging-Guided Phototherapy影像引导光治疗

Constructing photothermal, photodynamic, photoacoustic, and multimodal imaging platforms for precise cancer therapy under near-infrared activation.构建光热、光动力、光声和多模态影像平台，在近红外激发下实现精准肿瘤治疗。

03

Thread 03方向 03

Tumor Microenvironment-Responsive Therapy肿瘤微环境响应治疗

Engineering biodegradable and metabolizable nanocomposites that respond to tumor acidity, redox state, lactate metabolism, and immune contexture.开发可降解、可代谢的纳米复合材料，响应肿瘤酸性、氧化还原状态、乳酸代谢和免疫微环境。
